elements.description: Ø2"AVC vent-pipe-with-cap symbol at the top-left of the room
Ø2"FD floor drain near the top, adjacent to the vent stack
Ø2"W waste pipe running along the top of the plan toward the right
Ø3/4"CW pipe near the top-center of the room, feeding the fixture cluster
WC/toilet-style fixture icon near the top-right of the room, beside a second oval fixture icon (possibly a wash basin/LAV) further right
second Ø2"FD floor drain label near the toilet fixture cluster
Ø4"S soil pipe running down from the fixture cluster toward the center of the room

warnings: This is a small-scale (1:50) schematic underfloor-piping detail of upper-floor ห้องน้ำ 2, explicitly noted '( ท่อประปาเดินใต้พื้น )', matching this house's upper-floor plan (page53) room level (+4.00).

The dense fixture cluster near the top-right (toilet + possible second fixture) is not fully resolvable into distinct labeled symbols at this resolution -- described by position/shape, not guessed as specific fixture codes beyond what's legible.
grid_ref_is_free_text_not_grid_notation is correctly true -- this is not on the building's structural plan grid.
